title: Experience Nuggets
description: Adds Experience Nuggets for item-based XP storage and transfer!
body:
⚠️ IMPORTANT: USAGE GUIDELINES
If you're planning to use this on a server or modpack,
please refer to:
https://gamedash43.github.io/dash-mcl-licenses/#usage

![Title Text "Experience Nuggets"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c9d1ca63be5252c2a42d45e8ed5c992ea5a08db.png)
Experience Nuggets adds the ability to store and transport experience points as items.

# 📜 How to Use

### 1. Creating Experience Nuggets
- **Via Hopper Conversion:**  
  - Lead experience orbs into a vanilla hopper.  
  - The hopper converts the orbs into experience nuggets based on their value.
- **Manual Collection:**  
  - Stand on a hopper, shift, and look down.  
  - Hold until the hopper absorbs the desired amount of experience, converting it into an item.
- **Item Movement:**  
  - Once created, experience nuggets can be moved around like any other item.

### 2. Using Experience Nuggets
- **Placing Nuggets:**  
  - Right-click an experience nugget to place it, which releases an experience orb containing its stored value.
- **Using in Dispensers:**  
  - Experience nuggets can also be loaded into dispensers to dispense the stored experience when activated.

# ❓ FAQ

<details>
<summary>Why is there no experience merging feature?</summary>
I developed a script for merging experience, but it resulted in over nine different experience orb values per automatic farm, complicating filtering and storage.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How optimized is this add-on?</summary>
This datapack is a proof of concept and not fully optimized. It will continue to receive updates, but unless it gains popularity, a completely optimized version may not be released.
</details>
<details>
<summary>How do I report a bug?</summary>
Join the Discord and either DM me or post a message in the reports channel.
</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I uninstall this add-on?</summary>
Just run the command "/function dash.exp:uninstall"
</details>
